title: cocculus ovatus
intro: Cocculus ovatus, also known as the Paradise tree or King's Seed, is a plant native to tropical Asia and India, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and shiny black seeds. The medicinal properties of Cocculus ovatus lie in its seeds, which contain alkaloids that have been used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, anxiety, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cocculus ovatus include its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of restlessness, insomnia, and menstrual cramps. Cocculus ovatus can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
